description: Long-form stage and substage presence values for the heatmap.
sql:
SELECT * FROM (WITH scoped_wells AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT name
  FROM featurestore:merged_well_index_v1
  WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(fleet_name, ''), 'Unknown') = :fleet_name
    AND COALESCE(NULLIF(pad_name, ''), 'Unknown') = :pad_name
    AND (CAST(:well_name AS TEXT) IN ('', '__ALL__') OR name = :well_name)
),
label_presence AS (
  SELECT
    p.name AS well_name,
    p.stage_num_td AS stage_num,
    MAX(CASE WHEN LOWER(p.substage) = 'stage_start' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS stage_start,
    MAX(CASE WHEN LOWER(p.substage) = 'ramp_up' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ramp_up,
    MAX(CASE WHEN LOWER(p.substage) IN ('design', 'slurry') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS design,
    MAX(CASE WHEN LOWER(p.substage) = 'ramp_down' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ramp_down,
    MAX(CASE WHEN LOWER(p.substage) IN ('shut_off', 'shutoff', 'shut_off_period') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS shut_off,
    MAX(CASE WHEN LOWER(p.substage) = 'stage_end' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS stage_end
  FROM featurestore:merged_platinum_labels_v1 p
  JOIN scoped_wells w ON w.name = p.name
  WHERE p.stage_num_td IS NOT NULL
    AND p.substage IS NOT NULL
    AND LOWER(p.substage) <> 'na'
  GROUP BY p.name, p.stage_num_td
),
presence AS (
  SELECT
    well_name,
    stage_num,
    stage_start,
    ramp_up,
    design,
    ramp_down,
    shut_off,
    stage_end
  FROM label_presence
),
scored AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    stage_start + ramp_up + design + ramp_down + stage_end AS present_required,
    5 - (stage_start + ramp_up + design + ramp_down + stage_end) AS missing_count
  FROM presence
)
SELECT
  well_name,
  stage_num,
  CASE
    WHEN CAST(:well_name AS TEXT) IN ('', '__ALL__')
      THEN well_name || ' · ' || CAST(stage_num AS TEXT)
    ELSE CAST(stage_num AS TEXT)
  END AS stage_label,
  v.sort_order,
  v.substage_key,
  v.substage_label,
  v.presence_value
FROM scored
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
  VALUES
    (1, 'stage_start', 'Stage Start', stage_start),
    (2, 'ramp_up', 'Ramp Up', ramp_up),
    (3, 'design', 'Design', design),
    (4, 'ramp_down', 'Ramp Down', ramp_down),
    (5, 'shut_off', 'Shut-Off', shut_off),
    (6, 'stage_end', 'Stage End', stage_end)
) AS v(sort_order, substage_key, substage_label, presence_value)
ORDER BY well_name, stage_num, v.sort_order
) q
